en_title: Christopher Nolan Says Batman Helped Him Prepare for 'Irrelevant' Backlash to The Odyssey
cn_title: 克里斯托弗·诺兰称蝙蝠侠助其应对《奥德赛》争议
subtitle: 诺兰不惧舆论
opus_summary: 克里斯托弗·诺兰回应《奥德赛》上映前的选角与对白争议，称观众看电影前的讨论都「无关紧要」。他回顾执导《黑暗骑士》三部曲的经验，表示改编作品应以个人最有力的方式尊重原作；电影将于2026年7月17日上映。

paragraphs.en: After months of chatter from certain corners of the internet, Christopher Nolan is just days away from bringing The Odyssey to theaters, but he doesn't seem to be too bothered by what he called the "irrelevant" backlash.
paragraphs.cn: 网络某些角落的议论持续数月后，克里斯托弗·诺兰距离将《奥德赛》带上院线只剩几天，但他似乎并不太在意所谓「无关紧要」的反弹。

paragraphs.en: The director's adaptation of Homer's epic poem has faced resistance from online camps led by conservative figureheads like podcaster Matt Walsh and Tesla CEO Elon Musk. Most of the talking points in this regard have revolved around casting decisions, including Lupita Nyong'o as Helen of Troy/Clytemnestra and Elliot Page as Sinon , while others have homed in on its and modern English dialogue .
paragraphs.cn: 这位导演改编荷马史诗的作品，遭到播客主持人马特·沃尔什、特斯拉CEO埃隆·马斯克等保守派代表人物带头的网络阵营抵制。相关论点大多围绕选角决定展开，包括让露皮塔·尼永奥饰演海伦（特洛伊）/克吕泰涅斯特拉、让艾略特·佩吉饰演西农；另一些人则将注意力集中在其[原文缺失]以及现代英语对白上。

paragraphs.en: On the other side are those who feel much of the backlash boils down to thinly veiled racism and transphobia masquerading as calls for "historical accuracy." Either way, The Odyssey's detractors have been distractingly loud, flooding social media with criticism while allegedly swarming trailers with hundreds of thousands of "dislikes." Nolan, however, hasn't lost a wink of sleep.
paragraphs.cn: 另一方面，一些人认为大部分反弹归根结底是把赤裸裸的种族主义和跨性别恐惧，伪装成对「历史准确性」的要求。无论如何，《奥德赛》的反对者喧嚣得令人分心：他们用批评淹没社交媒体，还被指在预告片下刷出数十万次「踩」。不过，诺兰并未因此失眠。

paragraphs.en: "Comes with the territory," he said with a smile when The Telegraph asked for his reaction. "But look, these conversations that happen before people see the film – they’re always irrelevant, because no one having them knows what the film actually is yet."
paragraphs.cn: 《每日电讯报》询问他的反应时，他笑着说：「这是这一行的一部分。但你看，人们在看电影前进行的这些讨论总是无关紧要，因为参与讨论的人都还不知道电影究竟是什么样。」

paragraphs.en: Nolan expected The Odyssey, specifically, to become a talking point online. Although which elements of the film he expected to catch fire online is unclear, it doesn't sound like he was ever too worried. He added, "but remember, I spent 10 years of my life dealing with Batman," referencing his work as director for The Dark Knight trilogy.
paragraphs.cn: 诺兰预料《奥德赛》尤其会成为网络话题。虽然不清楚他预料电影中的哪些元素会在网上引爆，但听起来他从未太过担心。他补充道：「不过别忘了，我花了十年处理蝙蝠侠，」指的是他执导《黑暗骑士》三部曲的经历。

paragraphs.en: "When I came on to Batman Begins, writers and artists had been working on this beloved character for almost 65 years, and a lot of freighted thoughts were out there about what he represents," Nolan continued. "And what I learnt over my time on that trilogy is you can’t worry about any of that at all. What you have to do is honour the original text by interpreting it in the strongest way you personally can."
paragraphs.cn: 诺兰继续说道：「我参与《蝙蝠侠：侠影之谜》时，编剧和美术已经围绕这个备受喜爱的角色创作了近65年，外界对他代表什么也有很多沉重的看法。在那部三部曲的创作过程中，我学到的是，你完全不必为这些事担忧。你要做的是尊重原作，以你个人能做到的最有力方式诠释它。」

paragraphs.en: The Telegraph pointed to The Dark Knight and the decision to cast Heath Ledger as the Joker as another decision that was initially picked apart by skeptical fans. We all know how that turned out .
paragraphs.cn: 《每日电讯报》还提到《黑暗骑士》以及选择希斯·莱杰饰演小丑一事；当初这项决定同样被持怀疑态度的粉丝反复挑剔。我们都知道后来结果如何。

paragraphs.en: "In the end, fans of the property – even when we were doing something that was not what they would have done – enjoyed the sincerity of the attempt to put as good a version of it on screen as we could," Nolan said.
paragraphs.cn: 诺兰说：「最终，即使我们做的事情并不是粉丝会做的选择，他们仍然欣赏我们真诚地努力把尽可能好的版本搬上银幕。」

paragraphs.en: He continued: "All I can do is make the best film I possibly can in the most sincere way. It’s very different from how anyone else would do it, but that’s what adaptation is."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「我能做的只有用最真诚的方式，尽可能拍出最好的电影。它必然与其他人的做法大不相同，但这就是改编。」

paragraphs.en: All 2 hours and 53 minutes of The Odyssey will set sail when it comes to theaters July 17, 2026. In addition to its star-studded cast, fans can expect a film that Nolan says he crafted to "do away" with "cultural prejudices" about the ancient world . It will also feature an enormous practical Cyclops .
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》全片时长2小时53分钟，将于2026年7月17日驶入影院。除了群星云集的演员阵容，观众还可以期待一部诺兰称自己为「消除」人们对古代世界的「文化偏见」而打造的电影。片中还将出现一只巨大的实拍独眼巨人。

paragraphs.en: For more, you can read about what Nolan had to say about "AI slop." You can also catch up on his recent thoughts regarding what mainstream movies need to succeed .
paragraphs.cn: 更多内容可阅读诺兰谈「AI垃圾内容」的看法，也可以了解他最近对于主流电影需要什么才能成功的思考。
